$comment: Registry of upstream data sources for the 12-0 data pipeline. The pipeline (scripts/data/) reads this to know what to download, how to attribute it, and which license governs reuse. stats.nba.com is IP-blocked in this sandbox/CI (returns 000), so nba_api is an OPTIONAL local-only refresh; the open datasets below are the primary, reproducible inputs.

sources.title: FiveThirtyEight Historical RAPTOR / player-season data
sources.notes: Advanced per-season metrics from 1976-77 onward. Used as an input signal for era-aware rating formulas, not shipped verbatim.

sources.title: NBA per-game player stats, 1950-present
sources.notes: Long-history per-game box stats (ppg/rpg/apg/spg/bpg). Confirm exact repo + license at first ingest run before shipping. Era caveats: steals/blocks from 1973-74; 3PT from 1979-80.

sources.title: Recent-seasons NBA dataset (MIT)
sources.notes: Fills modern seasons + advanced stats (TS%, usage) available from 1996-97.

sources.title: NBA player headshots CDN
sources.notes: Reachable from sandbox (200). We store URLs + a verified/fallback flag, never the binary.

sources.title: nba_api (stats.nba.com client)
sources.notes: stats.nba.com is blocked in this sandbox/CI. Run scripts/data/refresh_nba_api.* only on a local machine with network access; commit the cached output so CI stays reproducible.

curatedOverrides.$comment: Subjective ratings can be hand-tuned here when formulas miss a well-known player (e.g. defensive specialists, clutch legends). Each override must cite a rationale and is layered AFTER the era-aware formula.
